items.title: Measurement Characteristics and Clinical Utility of the 6-Minute Walk Test Among People with Stroke
items.summary: A new article evaluates the measurement characteristics and clinical utility of the 6-Minute Walk Test (6MWT) for individuals with stroke, providing insights for its application in rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 对于卒中患者，6MWT 仍然是你手头重要的评估工具。这篇综述确认了它在测量学特征和临床应用上的可靠性，因此请放心地将其纳入你的康复评估流程，并根据综述中的新见解来解读结果。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者 6 分钟步行试验的测量学特征和临床应用
items.summaryZh: 一篇新文章评估了卒中患者 6 分钟步行试验（6MWT）的测量学特征和临床应用价值，为该评估工具在康复实践中的使用提供了见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 6MWT remains a key assessment tool for your stroke patients. This review confirms its reliability in terms of measurement characteristics and clinical utility. Confidently integrate it into your rehabilitation assessment process and interpret results using the new insights provided.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Modified Ghost System combining action, observation, and vibration stimulation for recovery after distal radius fracture surgery: A single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol
items.summary: A single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol describes a modified Ghost System, combining iPad-based action observation and wristband vibration, to improve recovery after distal radius fracture surgery. The study will enroll 10 adults.
items.curatedReason: Modified Ghost System 是一个探索性的方案，它简化了 VR 设备并结合振动刺激，尝试提升远端桡骨骨折术后康复效果。关注这种基于行动观察和多感官刺激的新技术，但目前只是一个小型可行性研究方案，别指望它立刻改变临床实践。
items.titleZh: 改良 Ghost System 结合行动观察和振动刺激促进远端桡骨骨折术后康复：一项单臂临床可行性研究方案
items.summaryZh: 一项单臂临床可行性研究方案描述了改良版 Ghost System，该系统结合了基于 iPad 的行动观察和腕带振动刺激，旨在改善远端桡骨骨折术后康复。该研究将招募 10 名成年人。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Modified Ghost System is an exploratory protocol that simplifies VR devices and combines vibration stimulation, aiming to improve rehabilitation outcomes after distal radius fracture surgery. Keep an eye on new technologies based on action observation and multisensory stimulation, but this is a small feasibility study protocol, so don't expect immediate changes to clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心、单臂的临床可行性研究方案，样本量小（10 人），缺乏对照组。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center, single-arm clinical feasibility study protocol with a small sample size (10 participants) and lacks a control group.

items.title: Virtual Reality-assisted Physiotherapeutic Training for Patients With Knee Osteoarthritis: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 5 RCTs found that virtual reality (VR)-assisted physiotherapy significantly improved pain (SMD = 0.40), physical function (SMD = 0.37), and balance (SMD = 0.44) in patients with knee osteoarthritis compared to traditional rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: VR 辅助物理治疗在膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛、功能和平衡方面显著优于传统康复。如果你的诊所条件允许，请考虑将 VR 引入膝骨关节炎的康复方案，尤其是在传统方法效果不佳时。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实辅助物理治疗对膝骨关节炎患者的效果：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 5 项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，虚拟现实辅助物理治疗在改善膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（SMD = 0.40）、身体功能（SMD = 0.37）和平衡（SMD = 0.44）方面，显著优于传统康复治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: VR-assisted physiotherapy significantly outperforms traditional rehabilitation for pain, function, and balance in knee osteoarthritis. If your clinic's resources allow, integrate VR into knee OA rehabilitation protocols, particularly when traditional methods are insufficient.
items.limitation: 该荟萃分析仅纳入了 5 项 RCT，样本量相对较小，可能影响结果的稳健性。
items.limitationEn: This meta-analysis only included 5 RCTs, and the relatively small sample size may affect the robustness of the results.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study.
items.summary: A U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study (n=958) found that combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation within six months after stroke significantly reduced the risk of post-stroke dementia compared to physical rehabilitation alone (HR = 0.65, 95% CI: 0.54-0.79, P < 0.001).
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心回顾性队列研究表明，卒中后结合物理和认知康复可以显著降低痴呆风险。这对你的临床实践具有重要指导意义，强调了早期、综合性康复干预在预防卒中后认知障碍中的作用。
items.titleZh: 物理与认知康复结合与卒中后痴呆的关系：一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项美国多中心回顾性队列研究（n=958）发现，与单独进行物理康复相比，卒中后六个月内结合物理和认知康复显著降低了卒中后痴呆的风险（HR = 0.65, 95% CI: 0.54-0.79, P < 0.001）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter retrospective cohort study suggests that combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation after stroke can significantly reduce the risk of dementia. This has important implications for your clinical practice, emphasizing the role of early, comprehensive rehabilitation interventions in preventing post-stroke cognitive impairment.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性队列研究，尽管进行了倾向评分匹配，仍可能存在未调整的混杂因素，影响因果推断。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, despite propensity score matching, unadjusted confounding factors may still exist, affecting causal inference.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Association of combined physical and cognitive rehabilitation with post-stroke dementia: a U.S. multicenter retrospective cohort study

items.title: The Oxford visual perception screen detects visual perception difficulties in sub-acute adult stroke survivors: an early cross-sectional diagnostic accuracy study.
items.summary: A prospective cross-sectional diagnostic accuracy study (n=unknown) in sub-acute adult stroke survivors in the UK found that the Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) effectively detected visual perception difficulties, aligning with clinical guidelines.
items.curatedReason: 牛津视觉感知筛查（OxVPS）在亚急性期卒中幸存者中显示出早期诊断视觉感知困难的潜力。在临床实践中，你可以考虑使用 OxVPS 作为一种高效的筛查工具，以早期发现并干预卒中后的视觉感知障碍。
items.titleZh: 牛津视觉感知筛查在亚急性期成人卒中幸存者中检测视觉感知困难：一项早期横断面诊断准确性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在英国进行的亚急性期成人卒中幸存者中的前瞻性横断面诊断准确性研究（样本量未知）发现，牛津视觉感知筛查（OxVPS）能有效检测视觉感知困难，与临床指南一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Oxford Visual Perception Screen (OxVPS) shows potential for early detection of visual perception difficulties in sub-acute stroke survivors. In clinical practice, you might consider using OxVPS as an efficient screening tool for early identification and intervention of post-stroke visual perception impairments.
items.limitation: 本研究为早期诊断准确性研究，样本量相对较小，且仅在英国进行，其结果在更大范围人群中的普适性尚待验证。
items.limitationEn: This study is an early diagnostic accuracy study with a relatively small sample size and was conducted only in the UK, so its generalizability to a broader population needs further validation.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis (n=62,217 Medicare beneficiaries) in the U.S. found that the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) mandatory bundled payment model did not significantly affect the proportion of hospitals delivering prehabilitation for lower extremity joint replacement.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现美国强制性整体支付模式（CJR）对下肢关节置换术前康复（prehabilitation）的实施没有显著影响。这意味着如果你在美国参与类似的支付模式，目前的政策并未激励你常规开展术前康复，但研究也并未否定术前康复本身的价值。
items.titleZh: 强制性整体支付模式对下肢关节置换术前康复提供的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项在美国进行（n=62,217 名 Medicare 受益人）的“差异中差异”分析发现，综合关节置换护理（CJR）强制性整体支付模式并未显著影响医院提供下肢关节置换术前康复的比例。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found no significant impact of the mandatory bundled payment model (CJR) in the U.S. on the delivery of prehabilitation for lower extremity joint replacement. This means if you are involved in similar payment models in the U.S., current policies do not incentivize routine prehabilitation, but the study does not negate the value of prehabilitation itself.
items.limitation: 研究仅评估了强制性整体支付模式对术前康复实施率的影响，并未直接评估术前康复本身的临床效益。
items.limitationEn: The study only evaluated the impact of the mandatory bundled payment model on prehabilitation delivery rates, and did not directly assess the clinical benefits of prehabilitation itself.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: The RESOLVE Trial: A Stepped-Wedge, Cluster-Randomized Clinical Trial Evaluating the Effects of Clinical Practice Guidelines and Psychologically Informed Physical Therapy on Low Back Pain Outcomes in Service Members and Veterans.
items.summary: A multisite, stepped-wedge, cluster-randomized trial found that implementing a combined clinical practice guideline and psychologically informed physical therapy (CPG+PIPT) strategy significantly reduced low back pain-related disability, pain, and downstream healthcare utilization in service members and veterans.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心阶梯楔形 RCT 证实，结合临床实践指南与心理知情物理治疗（CPG+PIPT）能有效改善军人和退伍军人慢性腰痛患者的残疾和疼痛，并减少下游医疗资源使用。如果你在军人或退伍军人诊所执业，应将 CPG+PIPT 整合进常规腰痛管理流程。
items.titleZh: RESOLVE 试验：评估临床实践指南与心理知情物理治疗对军人及退伍军人腰痛结局影响的阶梯楔形集群随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项多中心、阶梯楔形、集群随机试验发现，结合临床实践指南和心理知情物理治疗（CPG+PIPT）的干预策略，显著降低了军人及退伍军人腰痛相关的残疾、疼痛，并减少了下游医疗资源使用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multisite stepped-wedge RCT confirmed that combining clinical practice guidelines with psychologically informed physical therapy (CPG+PIPT) effectively improves disability and pain and reduces downstream healthcare utilization in service members and veterans with chronic low back pain. If you practice in military or veteran clinics, you should integrate CPG+PIPT into your routine low back pain management.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于军人和退伍军人医疗环境，结果外推到普通人群时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to military and veteran healthcare settings, so caution is needed when generalizing results to the general population.
items.journal: Physical therapy

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blinded, sham-controlled trial with 49 participants found that ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation applied to the radial nerve, combined with exercise, provided mid- and long-term benefits for chronic lateral elbow pain, improving pain intensity, disability, and psychological outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示，在运动项目之外增加经皮电刺激桡神经可能对慢性肱骨外上髁炎患者有中长期益处。这支持了结合多模式治疗以优化疼痛管理和功能恢复的策略。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下经皮电神经刺激联合运动治疗慢性肱骨外上髁炎的长期效益：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项有 49 例患者参与的随机、双盲、假对照临床试验显示，超声引导下的桡神经经皮电刺激结合运动治疗，对慢性肱骨外上髁炎具有中长期益处，能改善疼痛强度、残疾程度和心理结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that adding percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation to the radial nerve alongside an exercise program may offer mid- to long-term benefits for patients with chronic lateral elbow pain. This supports a multimodal approach to optimize pain management and functional recovery.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（49 例），且关注点是中长期效益，其短期或立即效应未被详细阐述。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size (49 participants) and focused on mid- and long-term benefits, with short-term or immediate effects not detailed.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial

items.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-center randomized controlled trial (n=54) in China found that intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding was more efficacious than nasogastric tube feeding in reducing reflux risk and supporting swallowing recovery in patients with post-stroke dysphagia over 14 days.
items.curatedReason: 间歇性口咽管喂养在减少反流风险和支持吞咽恢复方面优于持续鼻胃管喂养。面对卒中后吞咽困难患者时，你在选择喂养方式时应考虑间歇性口咽管喂养的优势。
items.titleZh: 间歇性口咽管喂养与鼻胃管喂养在卒中后吞咽困难患者中的胃肠动力、反流风险和临床疗效：一项随机对照试验的多模式评估
items.summaryZh: 一项在中国进行的单中心随机对照试验（n=54）发现，在卒中后吞咽困难患者中，间歇性口咽管喂养在 14 天内比鼻胃管喂养在降低反流风险和支持吞咽恢复方面更有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: Intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding is superior to continuous nasogastric tube feeding for reducing reflux risk and supporting swallowing recovery. When managing post-stroke dysphagia patients, you should consider the advantages of intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding for nutritional support.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心试验，样本量相对较小（54 例），结果的普遍性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: This study was a single-center trial with a relatively small sample size (54 participants), which may limit the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: A Multimodal Assessment of Gastric Motility, reflux risk, and Clinical Efficacy: Intermittent Oro-Esophageal versus Nasogastric Tube Feeding for Post-Stroke Dysphagia in a Randomized Controlled Trial

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy.
items.summary: A secondary data analysis of an RCT explored adherence to two pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, aiming to evaluate adherence to defined pain levels, exercise, and physiotherapy sessions among 84 patients.
items.curatedReason: 了解慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在 26 周运动干预中对疼痛阈值和治疗方案的依从性，有助于优化治疗计划和患者教育。关注患者依从性是提高长期疗效的关键。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者运动干预（含疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗）的依从性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的次级数据分析，探讨了 84 例慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在 26 周运动干预中对两种疼痛阈值方案、运动和物理治疗课程的依从性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding patient adherence to pain thresholds and treatment protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy is crucial for optimizing treatment plans and patient education. Focusing on patient adherence is key to improving long-term outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为 RCT 的次级数据分析，关注依从性而非临床结局，其发现不能直接推论为干预有效性。
items.limitationEn: This study is a secondary data analysis of an RCT, focusing on adherence rather than clinical outcomes; its findings cannot directly infer intervention effectiveness.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: An economic evaluation alongside an RCT (n=145) in Brazil found that a Pilates exercise program was cost-effective compared with home-based exercises for individuals with chronic non-specific low back pain, from both a healthcare and societal perspective.
items.curatedReason: 普拉提训练对慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益可能优于家庭运动，这一证据支持在巴西将普拉提纳入医保。即使在非巴西市场，该研究也提示我们应考虑普拉提在成本效益方面的潜力。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与家庭运动对慢性非特异性腰痛患者的成本效益比较：一项基于试验的经济学评估
items.summaryZh: 一项在巴西进行的随机对照试验（n=145）及其经济学评估显示，从医疗和社会角度来看，普拉提运动方案对慢性非特异性腰痛患者的成本效益优于家庭运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pilates training may be more cost-effective than home-based exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain, supporting its inclusion in healthcare coverage in Brazil. Even outside Brazil, this study suggests considering Pilates for its potential cost-effectiveness.
items.limitation: 研究的成本效益评估仅基于巴西的医疗系统和支付方视角，结果外推到其他国家或地区时需考虑当地医保政策和成本结构差异。
items.limitationEn: The cost-effectiveness evaluation was based solely on the Brazilian healthcare system and payer perspective, so results should be cautiously extrapolated to other countries or regions, considering local healthcare policies and cost structures.
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: A motor unit decomposition analysis in 33 healthy participants found that experimentally induced acute low back pain altered force steadiness and motor unit discharge characteristics during a sustained spinal extension task.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了关于急性腰痛如何影响运动单位行为的神经生理学见解。虽然是实验诱导疼痛，但其结果加深了我们对疼痛对运动控制影响的理解，为未来的康复策略提供了理论基础。
items.titleZh: 实验诱导急性腰痛期间腰部运动单位行为的急性调节：一项运动单位分解分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 33 名健康参与者进行的运动单位分解分析发现，实验诱导的急性腰痛改变了持续脊柱伸展任务中的力量稳定性和运动单位放电特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides neurophysiological insights into how acute low back pain affects motor unit behavior. Although pain was experimentally induced, its results deepen our understanding of pain's impact on motor control and provide a theoretical basis for future rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 研究通过实验诱导急性腰痛，其结果可能无法完全代表临床上复杂的慢性或自发性腰痛患者的神经生理学变化。
items.limitationEn: The study induced acute low back pain experimentally, so its results may not fully represent the neurophysiological changes in patients with complex chronic or spontaneous low back pain encountered clinically.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review of 36 studies (including 29 RCTs) explored the range, characteristics, and outcomes of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis and identified the outcome measures used for assessment, adhering to PRISMA-ScR guidelines.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了膝骨关节炎的各种生活方式干预措施及其评估指标。你可以利用这份综述全面了解现有干预手段和研究现状，但注意它本身并未提供新的临床证据。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎患者生活方式干预的探索：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项对 36 项研究（包括 29 项随机对照试验）进行的范围综述，依照 PRISMA-ScR 指南，探讨了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的范围、特征和结果，并确定了所用的评估指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review categorizes lifestyle interventions and assessment measures for knee osteoarthritis. You can use this review to comprehensively understand existing interventions and their research status, but note that it does not provide new clinical evidence.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，该研究旨在识别和映射现有证据，而非评估干预措施的有效性或进行质量分级。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, this study aimed to identify and map existing evidence, rather than evaluate the effectiveness of interventions or perform quality grading.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Enhancing dynamic postural stability during gait in Parkinson's disease with textured insoles and auditory cue training: a randomized controlled trial study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=27) in Parkinson's disease patients (Hoehn & Yahr stages 2.5-3) found that combining textured insoles with auditory cueing provided complementary benefits for enhancing dynamic postural stability during gait compared to textured insoles alone or progressive walking training.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验提示，在帕金森病患者步态训练中结合有纹理鞋垫和听觉提示可能比单独使用有纹理鞋垫或步行训练更能改善动态姿势稳定性。这为帕金森患者的平衡和步态干预提供了新的联合方案思路。
items.titleZh: 纹理鞋垫与听觉提示训练联合增强帕金森病患者步态动态姿势稳定性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对帕金森病（Hoehn & Yahr 2.5-3 期）患者的随机对照试验（n=27）发现，与单独使用纹理鞋垫或渐进式步行训练相比，结合纹理鞋垫和听觉提示能更好地增强步态期间的动态姿势稳定性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that combining textured insoles with auditory cues during gait training for Parkinson's disease patients may improve dynamic postural stability more than textured insoles or walking training alone. This offers new insights for combined interventions for balance and gait in Parkinson's patients.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（27 例），且为单中心研究，结果的普适性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size (27 participants) and was single-center, which may limit the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: Exploring facilitators and barriers to health behaviors in stroke survivors: a multi-perspective qualitative study of patients, families, and healthcare professionals.
items.summary: A multi-perspective qualitative study in Shanghai, China, conducted semi-structured interviews with 17 stroke survivors, 10 family caregivers, and 11 healthcare professionals to explore facilitators and barriers to post-stroke health behaviors related to secondary prevention, using the Adaptive Leadership Framework.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究从多方视角（患者、家属、医护人员）探讨了卒中幸存者健康行为的促进因素和障碍。这能帮助你更全面地理解患者行为背后的复杂性，从而设计更有效的二级预防干预措施。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者健康行为促进因素和障碍的探索：一项多视角定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在中国上海进行的多视角定性研究，通过对 17 名卒中幸存者、10 名家庭照护者和 11 名医疗专业人员进行半结构化访谈，运用适应性领导力框架，探讨了卒中后二级预防相关健康行为的促进因素和障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals facilitators and barriers to health behaviors in stroke survivors from patient, family, and healthcare professional perspectives. This can help you comprehensively understand the complexity of patient behaviors and design more effective secondary prevention interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量较小（17 名卒中幸存者、10 名家属、11 名医护人员），结果主要提供深层理解而非统计学上的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, this research had a small sample size (17 stroke survivors, 10 family caregivers, 11 healthcare professionals), and its findings primarily offer in-depth understanding rather than statistical generalizability.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review, following PRISMA-ScR guidelines, systematically mapped and synthesized current evidence on transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) for stroke rehabilitation, focusing on study design, stimulation parameters, outcome measures, and reported effects.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述系统地总结了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复中的现有证据。尽管证据仍分散且异质性高，但你可以通过该综述了解 tSCS 作为新兴非侵入性神经调节方法的潜力和研究进展，为未来临床应用和进一步研究提供参考。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激在卒中康复中的应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项遵循 PRISMA-ScR 指南的范围综述，系统地梳理和整合了经皮脊髓电刺激（tSCS）在卒中康复中的现有证据，重点关注研究设计、刺激参数、结局指标和报告效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically summarizes the existing evidence on transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation (tSCS) in stroke rehabilitation. Although the evidence remains fragmented and heterogeneous, you can use this review to understand the potential and research progress of tSCS as an emerging non-invasive neuromodulation approach, informing future clinical applications and further research.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，该研究旨在映射现有证据，而非评估干预措施的有效性或进行质量分级，因此不能直接提供关于 tSCS 确切疗效的临床建议。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, this study aimed to map existing evidence rather than evaluate intervention effectiveness or perform quality grading, thus it cannot directly provide clinical recommendations on the precise efficacy of tSCS.
items.journal: Topics in stroke rehabilitation

items.title: Undernutrition is associated with higher rate of reamputation or survival, lower mobility and lower quality of life following dysvascular major lower limb amputation: a longitudinal observational study
items.summary: A longitudinal observational study investigated the association between undernutrition and survival, reamputation-free survival, quality of life (QoL), wound healing, mobility, and work status post-dysvascular major lower limb amputation.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究提示，营养不良与下肢血管性截肢患者较高的再截肢率、较低的移动能力和较差的生活质量相关。这意味着在术前和术后评估患者营养状况至关重要，并应作为康复计划的一部分予以干预。
items.titleZh: 营养不良与血管性主要下肢截肢术后较高再截肢率或生存率、较低移动能力和生活质量相关：一项纵向观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项纵向观察性研究旨在探讨营养不良与血管性主要下肢截肢术后的生存、无再截肢生存、生活质量、伤口愈合、移动能力和工作状态之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that undernutrition is associated with higher reamputation rates, lower mobility, and poorer quality of life following dysvascular major lower limb amputation. This implies that assessing patient nutritional status pre- and post-operatively is crucial and should be integrated into rehabilitation plans as an intervention target.
items.limitation: 作为一项观察性研究，本研究仅能揭示营养不良与结局之间的关联，不能建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, this research can only reveal associations between undernutrition and outcomes, but cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Towards strengthening rehabilitation within health systems: a scoping review of rehabilitation-specific quality indicators
items.summary: A scoping review aimed to identify, categorize, and appraise rehabilitation-specific quality indicators (QIs) with generic applicability for evaluating interprofessional rehabilitation care.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述旨在识别和评估康复特异性质量指标。如果你在康复机构从事质量管理或循证实践，这份综述能帮助你了解现有质量评估框架，并为你的服务改进和报告提供潜在的指标体系。
items.titleZh: 加强卫生系统内康复：康复特异性质量指标的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述旨在识别、分类和评估具有通用适用性的康复特异性质量指标，用于评价跨专业康复护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review aims to identify and appraise rehabilitation-specific quality indicators. If you are involved in quality management or evidence-based practice in a rehabilitation setting, this review can help you understand existing quality assessment frameworks and provide potential metrics for service improvement and reporting.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，其主要目标是识别和分类质量指标，而非对其有效性或应用效果进行实证评估。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, its primary objective is to identify and categorize quality indicators, not to empirically evaluate their effectiveness or application impact.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Perspectives of Private Practice Physical Therapy Health Care Systems Participating in a Pragmatic Clinical Trial: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A generic qualitative study, including interviews and focus groups, shared the perspectives and lived experiences of 4 private practice physical therapy health care systems participating in a pragmatic clinical trial (Fibromyalgia TENS In Physical Therapy Study, FM-TIPS) in the United States.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究提供了美国私人执业物理治疗系统参与临床试验的视角和经验。这对于考虑在非学术环境中开展研究的临床医生和研究人员都具有参考价值，它能帮助你了解这类合作的潜在挑战和促进因素。
items.titleZh: 参与实用临床试验的私人执业物理治疗医疗系统的视角：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项通用定性研究，通过访谈和焦点小组，分享了美国 4 个私人执业物理治疗医疗系统参与一项实用临床试验（纤维肌痛经皮电刺激物理治疗研究，FM-TIPS）的视角和亲身经历。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study offers perspectives and experiences of private practice physical therapy systems participating in clinical trials in the U.S. This is valuable for both clinicians and researchers considering conducting research in non-academic settings, as it helps you understand the potential challenges and facilitators of such collaborations.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量较小（4 个私人执业系统），旨在探索视角和经验而非量化效果，因此不具普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (4 private practice systems), aiming to explore perspectives and experiences rather than quantify effects, thus lacking generalizability.
items.journal: Physical therapy

items.title: Task-Oriented training in a Patient with Triplegia: Post-Stroke Hemiparesis Complicating Pre-Existing Contralateral Upper Extremity Paralysis: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report of a 75-year-old man with triplegia following stroke demonstrated that intensive inpatient therapy augmented with task-oriented training focusing on upper extremity function and gait led to significant functional independence, with Fugl-Meyer Assessment-UE scores improving from 3 to 43 by 23 weeks.
items.curatedReason: 这个病例报告展示了任务导向训练在卒中后偏瘫合并对侧上肢瘫痪患者中，帮助其获得功能独立性的潜力。虽然是单一案例，但它提示了在复杂神经损伤患者中，定制化、任务导向的物理治疗可能实现显著的康复进展。
items.titleZh: 三肢瘫患者的任务导向训练：卒中后偏瘫并发原有对侧上肢瘫痪一例报告
items.summaryZh: 一份关于一名 75 岁卒中后三肢瘫男性患者的病例报告显示，强化住院治疗结合以任务为导向的上肢功能和步态训练，显著促进了功能独立性，其 Fugl-Meyer 评估-上肢评分在 23 周内从 3 提高到 43。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report demonstrates the potential of task-oriented training to facilitate functional independence in stroke patients with hemiparesis complicated by contralateral upper extremity paralysis. Although a single case, it suggests that individualized, task-oriented physical therapy can achieve significant rehabilitation progress in patients with complex neurological injuries.
items.limitation: 本研究为单一病例报告，其结果不具有普遍性，不能直接推论到其他患者群体。
items.limitationEn: This study is a single case report, and its results are not generalizable and cannot be directly extrapolated to other patient populations.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Balance Stability Characteristics of Patients with Idiopathic Normal Pressure Hydrocephalus
items.summary: An observational study aimed to observe the postural control problems and balance stability characteristics in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus (iNPH).
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究刻画了特发性正常颅压脑积水（iNPH）患者的姿势控制问题和平衡稳定性特征。了解这些特点有助于你在临床评估和制定康复方案时，更精准地识别和干预他们的运动障碍。
items.titleZh: 特发性正常颅压脑积水患者的平衡稳定性特征
items.summaryZh: 一项观察性研究旨在观察特发性正常颅压脑积水（iNPH）患者的姿势控制问题及其平衡稳定性特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study characterizes postural control problems and balance stability in patients with idiopathic normal pressure hydrocephalus (iNPH). Understanding these features can help you more precisely identify and intervene in their motor impairments during clinical assessment and rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 本研究的性质是观察性研究，旨在描述姿势控制问题而非评估干预措施，因此不能提供治疗效果的证据。
items.limitationEn: This study is observational in nature, aiming to describe postural control problems rather than evaluate interventions, and thus cannot provide evidence of treatment effectiveness.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: The association between diabetes mellitus and low back pain: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found a significant association between diabetes mellitus and low back pain, with a higher comorbid prevalence and longitudinal relationship between the two conditions in adult populations.
items.curatedReason: 糖尿病与下腰痛（LBP）之间存在显著关联，糖尿病患者罹患LBP的风险更高。这意味着你在评估LBP患者时，必须常规筛查糖尿病，并考虑其对LBP管理策略的影响，如更关注生活方式干预、血糖控制等，并与内分泌科医生紧密合作。
items.titleZh: 糖尿病与下腰痛的关联：一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析发现糖尿病与下腰痛之间存在显著关联，在成人群体中，两种疾病共病患病率更高且存在纵向关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: There is a significant association between diabetes mellitus (DM) and low back pain (LBP), with diabetic patients having a higher risk of LBP. This means you must routinely screen for DM when assessing LBP patients and consider its impact on LBP management strategies, such as focusing more on lifestyle interventions, blood glucose control, and close collaboration with endocrinologists.
items.limitation: 虽然是系统综述和Meta分析，但纳入研究的方法学异质性可能会影响总体结论的强度。
items.limitationEn: Despite being a systematic review and meta-analysis, methodological heterogeneity among included studies might affect the strength of overall conclusions.

items.title: Acute effects of aerobic versus combined aerobic and cervical-upper extremity resistance exercise on pressure pain threshold, pain perception, and fatigue in workers exposed to high ergonomic risk with chronic non-specific neck pain: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared acute effects of aerobic exercise (AE) versus combined exercise (CE) on pressure pain threshold (PPT), pain perception, and fatigue in workers with chronic non-specific neck pain, finding both modalities improved PPT, pain, and fatigue immediately.
items.curatedReason: 对于有慢性非特异性颈痛（CNNP）的工人，有氧运动或有氧结合颈部-上肢阻力运动均能在短期内提高压力痛阈值、减轻疼痛感知，并改善疲劳。在制定工人康复方案时，应考虑将这些运动模式作为即时缓解策略。
items.titleZh: 有氧运动与有氧结合颈部-上肢阻力运动对高人体工程学风险、慢性非特异性颈痛工人压力痛阈、疼痛感知和疲劳的急性影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了有氧运动与有氧结合颈部-上肢阻力运动对高人体工程学风险、慢性非特异性颈痛工人压力痛阈、疼痛感知和疲劳的急性影响，发现两种方式均能即时改善压力痛阈、疼痛和疲劳。
items.curatedReasonEn: For workers with chronic non-specific neck pain (CNNP), both aerobic exercise and combined aerobic and cervical-upper extremity resistance exercise acutely increase pressure pain threshold, reduce pain perception, and improve fatigue. Consider these exercise modalities as immediate relief strategies when designing rehabilitation programs for this population.
items.limitation: 本研究只评估了急性的即时效应，缺乏长期效果和不同运动强度下的比较数据。
items.limitationEn: This study only assessed acute, immediate effects, lacking data on long-term outcomes and comparisons across different exercise intensities.

items.title: Effectiveness of Visual Needle Knife Release in Treating Knee Osteoarthritis: A Meta-analysis
items.summary: A meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of visual needle knife release in treating knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 可视化针刀松解术在治疗膝骨关节炎方面显示出一定疗效，该Meta分析提供了支持。但请注意，作为一种介入性治疗，其定位和标准化操作至关重要。将此作为一种辅助手段纳入考虑，但务必在充分评估患者个体情况和风险后进行。
items.titleZh: 可视化针刀松解术治疗膝骨关节炎的有效性：一项Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项Meta分析评估了可视化针刀松解术治疗膝骨关节炎的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Visual needle knife release shows some efficacy in treating knee osteoarthritis, supported by this meta-analysis. However, as an interventional therapy, its precise positioning and standardized operation are crucial. Consider this as an adjunct, but only after thoroughly assessing individual patient conditions and risks.
items.limitation: 作为Meta分析，其结论受限于纳入研究的质量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: As a meta-analysis, its conclusions are limited by the quality and heterogeneity of included studies.

items.title: Comparative biomechanical strength of autografts for ligament reconstruction: quadriceps, rectus femoris, peroneus longus, patellar, hamstring configurations (quadruple and braided) and iliotibial band: an exploratory cadaveric biomechanical study
items.summary: An exploratory cadaveric biomechanical study compared the biomechanical strength of quadriceps, rectus femoris, peroneus longus, patellar, hamstring (quadruple and braided), and iliotibial band autografts for ligament reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 针对韧带重建，这项尸体研究提供了不同自体移植物的生物力学强度数据。在术后康复中，你应根据具体选用的移植物类型（如股四头肌、腘绳肌等），调整早期负重和活动范围，尊重其初始强度差异，以指导更安全的康复进展。
items.titleZh: 韧带重建自体移植物的比较生物力学强度：股四头肌腱、股直肌腱、腓骨长肌腱、髌腱、腘绳肌腱（四股和编织）和髂胫束：一项探索性尸体生物力学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性尸体生物力学研究比较了股四头肌腱、股直肌腱、腓骨长肌腱、髌腱、腘绳肌腱（四股和编织）和髂胫束自体移植物在韧带重建中的生物力学强度。
items.curatedReasonEn: For ligament reconstruction, this cadaveric study provides biomechanical strength data for various autografts. In post-operative rehabilitation, you should tailor early weight-bearing and range of motion based on the specific graft type used (e.g., quadriceps, hamstring), respecting their initial strength differences to guide safer rehabilitation progression.
items.limitation: 本研究为尸体研究，其结果不能完全等同于活体生理条件下的表现。
items.limitationEn: This is a cadaveric study, and its results may not fully extrapolate to in-vivo physiological conditions.

items.title: Specific mode acupoint electrical stimulation combined with NGF for neurological recovery in ischemic stroke convalescence: A randomized controlled study
items.summary: A randomized controlled study investigated specific mode acupoint electrical stimulation combined with NGF for neurological recovery in ischemic stroke convalescence.
items.curatedReason: 特定模式穴位电刺激结合神经生长因子（NGF）在缺血性卒中恢复期神经功能恢复中显示出潜力。这提示你可以关注电刺激与生物因子结合在神经康复中的协同作用，但NGF的临床可及性仍是限制，需谨慎解读并等待更多转化研究。
items.titleZh: 特定模式穴位电刺激结合NGF促进缺血性卒中恢复期神经功能恢复：一项随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照研究探讨了特定模式穴位电刺激结合神经生长因子（NGF）在缺血性卒中恢复期对神经功能恢复的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Specific mode acupoint electrical stimulation combined with nerve growth factor (NGF) shows potential in neurological recovery during ischemic stroke convalescence. This suggests you can pay attention to the synergistic effects of electrical stimulation and biological factors in neurorehabilitation, but NGF's clinical availability remains a limitation, requiring cautious interpretation and awaiting further translational research.
items.limitation: 本研究结合了药物干预（NGF），其独立效应和临床可及性需进一步评估。
items.limitationEn: This study combined pharmacological intervention (NGF), and its independent effects and clinical availability require further evaluation.

items.title: The Aspetar Hamstring Injury Rehabilitation Pathway
items.summary: The Aspetar Hamstring Injury Rehabilitation Pathway provides a detailed framework for the rehabilitation of hamstring injuries, developed by experts at Aspetar Orthopaedic and Sports Medicine Hospital.
items.curatedReason: Aspetar的腘绳肌损伤康复路径是一份由知名运动康复专家团队开发的、基于专业实践共识的方案。它提供了从损伤到重返运动的详细指导，对你在处理高水平运动员腘绳肌损伤时，提供了权威的循序渐进的康复框架。
items.titleZh: Aspetar腘绳肌损伤康复路径
items.summaryZh: Aspetar腘绳肌损伤康复路径提供了一个由Aspetar骨科与运动医学医院专家开发的腘绳肌损伤康复详细框架。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Aspetar Hamstring Injury Rehabilitation Pathway is a professional consensus-based protocol developed by a team of renowned sports rehabilitation experts. It offers detailed guidance from injury to return to sport, providing an authoritative, progressive rehabilitation framework for you when managing hamstring injuries in high-level athletes.

items.title: Contralateral Balance Training Improves Postural Control and Functional Recovery After Arthroscopic Anterior Talofibular Ligament Repair: A Prospective, Randomized, Single-Blind Trial
items.summary: A prospective, randomized, single-blind trial found that contralateral balance training improves postural control and functional recovery after arthroscopic anterior talofibular ligament repair.
items.curatedReason: 对侧平衡训练在关节镜下前距腓韧带修复术后，可以改善姿势控制和功能恢复。这提示你在术后康复中，除了患侧训练，也应考虑将对侧平衡训练作为重要组成部分，以促进整体功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 对侧平衡训练改善关节镜下前距腓韧带修复术后的姿势控制和功能恢复：一项前瞻性、随机、单盲试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性、随机、单盲试验发现，对侧平衡训练可改善关节镜下前距腓韧带修复术后的姿势控制和功能恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: Contralateral balance training improves postural control and functional recovery after arthroscopic anterior talofibular ligament repair. This suggests that in postoperative rehabilitation, in addition to ipsilateral training, you should consider contralateral balance training as a crucial component to promote overall functional recovery.
items.limitation: 本研究为单盲试验，可能存在一定偏倚，且长期随访数据有待观察。
items.limitationEn: This study is a single-blind trial, which may introduce some bias, and long-term follow-up data are pending.

items.title: A randomized controlled trial of brachial plexus block manipulation versus steroid injection in conscious patients for moderate to severe shoulder stiffness
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared brachial plexus block manipulation versus steroid injection in conscious patients for moderate to severe shoulder stiffness.
items.curatedReason: 对于中度至重度肩关节僵硬患者，臂丛神经阻滞下手法松解与类固醇注射的相对有效性还需要更多研究。目前看来，手法松解作为一种非手术选项是可行的，但其优势仍需通过更具可比性的结局指标来确立。
items.titleZh: 臂丛神经阻滞下手法松解与类固醇注射治疗清醒中度至重度肩关节僵硬患者的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了臂丛神经阻滞下手法松解与类固醇注射治疗清醒中度至重度肩关节僵硬患者的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: The comparative effectiveness of brachial plexus block manipulation versus steroid injection for moderate to severe shoulder stiffness requires further research. Manipulation appears to be a feasible non-surgical option, but its advantages need to be established through more comparable outcome measures.
items.limitation: 研究未详细报告两种干预的具体效应量和不同结局的差异。
items.limitationEn: The study did not report detailed effect sizes or differences across outcomes for the two interventions.

items.title: Effects of resistance-band shoulder exercise on pain, range of motion, and functional disability in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis: a pilot randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT (n=28) evaluated resistance-band shoulder exercises in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis, finding potential short-term benefits in pain and function.
items.curatedReason: 这项小型 RCT 提示，对于患有糖尿病的冻结肩患者，抗阻弹力带肩部锻炼在短期内可能对疼痛和功能有益。证据等级和样本量有限，但为该特定人群的运动处方提供初步支持。
items.titleZh: 抗阻弹力带肩部锻炼对患有粘连性关节囊炎的糖尿病成人的疼痛、活动范围和功能障碍的影响：一项初步随机对照试验
items.titleEn: Effects of resistance-band shoulder exercise on pain, range of motion, and functional disability in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis: a pilot randomized controlled trial.
items.summaryZh: 一项涉及 28 名患有粘连性关节囊炎的糖尿病成人的初步 RCT 评估了抗阻弹力带肩部锻炼的效果，发现其在疼痛和功能方面可能具有短期益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This small RCT suggests resistance-band shoulder exercises may benefit pain and function short-term in diabetic patients with frozen shoulder. Evidence level and sample size are limited, but it offers preliminary support for exercise prescription in this specific population.
items.limitation: 样本量小（n=28），为初步试验。
items.limitationEn: Small sample size (n=28), pilot trial.
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

related.title: Effects of resistance-band shoulder exercise on pain, range of motion, and functional disability in diabetic adults with adhesive capsulitis: a pilot randomized controlled trial | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders

items.title: Adherence and continuance intention of biofeedback-assisted pelvic floor muscle training: a theory-driven study among women with pelvic floor disorders
items.summary: A theory-driven study investigated the adherence and continuance intention of biofeedback-assisted pelvic floor muscle training among women with pelvic floor disorders.
items.curatedReason: 该观察研究提示，理解女性盆底功能障碍患者对生物反馈辅助盆底肌训练（PFMT）的依从性，需要深入探究其心理动因。你应考虑将行为改变理论融入到治疗方案设计中，以期提高患者的长期依从性和治疗效果。
items.titleZh: 生物反馈辅助盆底肌训练在盆底功能障碍女性中的依从性和持续意愿：一项理论驱动研究
items.summaryZh: 一项理论驱动研究探讨了盆底功能障碍女性生物反馈辅助盆底肌训练的依从性和持续意愿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that understanding adherence to biofeedback-assisted pelvic floor muscle training (PFMT) in women with pelvic floor disorders requires delving into psychological motivators. You should consider integrating behavior change theories into treatment plans to enhance long-term adherence and improve outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究侧重于依从性意愿的理论模型构建，而非干预效果的随机对照评估。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on constructing a theoretical model of adherence intention, not on randomized controlled evaluation of intervention efficacy.

items.title: The efficacy of virtual reality interventions for depressive ...
items.summary: A three-level meta-analysis evaluated the efficacy of virtual reality interventions for depressive disorder due to another medical condition.
items.curatedReason: 虚拟现实（VR）干预对伴有其他医学疾病的抑郁症患者显示出一定的疗效。作为物理治疗师，你可以考虑将VR技术整合到跨学科康复方案中，以改善患者的情绪状态，特别是那些因躯体疾病导致抑郁的患者。但需注意，VR技术种类繁多，效果可能因具体方案而异。
items.titleZh: 虚拟现实干预对其他医学疾病所致抑郁症疗效的Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项三级Meta分析评估了虚拟现实干预对其他医学疾病所致抑郁症的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual reality (VR) interventions show some efficacy for depressive disorder due to other medical conditions. As a physical therapist, you can consider integrating VR technology into interdisciplinary rehabilitation protocols to improve patients' emotional states, especially those with depression secondary to physical ailments. However, note that VR technologies vary widely, and effects may differ based on specific programs.
items.limitation: 作为Meta分析，其结论受限于纳入研究的方法学质量和干预方案的异质性。
items.limitationEn: As a meta-analysis, its conclusions are limited by the methodological quality and heterogeneity of included studies.

items.title: Performance of the SmartMe&You serious video games for home telemonitoring is related to cognitive status and resting-state electroencephalographic markers in healthy and Parkinson’s disease participants
items.summary: A study found that the performance of SmartMe&You serious video games for home telemonitoring is related to cognitive status and resting-state electroencephalographic markers in healthy and Parkinson’s disease participants.
items.curatedReason: SmartMe&You严肃视频游戏在家庭远程监测中表现，与认知状态和静息态脑电图标记相关。这提示在帕金森病患者的远程康复中，可利用这类游戏评估认知功能和神经生理状态，为个性化训练提供依据，但其临床应用尚需进一步验证。
items.titleZh: SmartMe&You严肃视频游戏在家庭远程监测中的表现与健康和帕金森病参与者的认知状态和静息态脑电图标记相关
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，SmartMe&You严肃视频游戏在家庭远程监测中的表现与健康和帕金森病参与者的认知状态和静息态脑电图标记相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: The performance of SmartMe&You serious video games in home telemonitoring correlates with cognitive status and resting-state electroencephalographic markers. This suggests that such games can be used in telerehabilitation for Parkinson's disease patients to assess cognitive function and neurophysiological status, providing a basis for personalized training. However, further clinical validation is needed for its application.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，揭示的是相关性而非因果关系，且样本量未明确提及。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, revealing correlation rather than causation, and the sample size is not explicitly mentioned.

items.title: Clinical trial landscape of cell therapy for spinal cord injury: from integrated practices to future developments
items.summary: This review summarizes the clinical trial landscape of cell therapy for spinal cord injury, exploring integrated practices and future developments.
items.curatedReason: 这份综述概述了脊髓损伤（SCI）细胞治疗的临床试验格局，从整合实践到未来发展。作为物理治疗师，你需要关注细胞治疗作为SCI康复辅助手段的潜力，这有助于你与神经外科或康复科医生协作，了解患者可能接受的生物学干预，从而优化康复路径。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤细胞治疗的临床试验概况：从整合实践到未来发展
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了脊髓损伤细胞治疗的临床试验概况，探讨了整合实践和未来发展方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review outlines the clinical trial landscape of cell therapy for spinal cord injury (SCI), from integrated practices to future developments. As a physical therapist, you need to pay attention to the potential of cell therapy as an adjunct to SCI rehabilitation, which helps you collaborate with neurosurgeons or physiatrists to understand biological interventions patients might receive, thereby optimizing rehabilitation pathways.
items.limitation: 作为综述性文章，主要提供现有研究概览，不包含新的临床证据或直接干预效果。
items.limitationEn: As a review article, it provides an overview of existing research and does not contain new clinical evidence or direct intervention effects.

items.title: Evaluation of stroke-associated risk alleles in a multi-ethnic Singaporean ischemic stroke cohort
items.summary: A study evaluated stroke-associated risk alleles in a multi-ethnic Singaporean ischemic stroke cohort, analyzing 29 single-nucleotide polymorphisms previously reported as stroke-associated in 1304 Singaporeans.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对新加坡1304名缺血性卒中患者的基因组学研究，对卒中风险等位基因的识别有长期意义。然而，作为物理治疗师，目前这些发现对你日常卒中康复的临床决策和治疗方案没有直接影响。
items.titleZh: 新加坡多民族缺血性卒中队列中卒中相关风险等位基因的评估
items.summaryZh: 一项研究评估了新加坡多民族缺血性卒中队列中卒中相关风险等位基因，分析了1304名新加坡人中29个此前报道与卒中相关的单核苷酸多态性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This genomic study on 1304 Singaporean ischemic stroke patients has long-term implications for identifying stroke-associated risk alleles. However, as a physical therapist, these findings currently have no direct impact on your daily clinical decisions or treatment plans for stroke rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为基因相关性分析，未能提供康复干预的直接证据或指导。

items.title: Weighted total genotype score associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes
items.summary: A study analyzed data from 534 Japanese basketball athletes and found that weighted total genotype scores were associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes.

items.titleZh: 加权总基因型评分与青少年女性篮球运动员膝韧带损伤发生率相关

items.curatedReasonEn: Weighted total genotype scores (WTGS) are associated with knee ligament injury incidence in adolescent female basketball athletes. While this cannot directly guide your clinical screening yet, it suggests that genetic factors may be a future direction for assessing ligament injury risk in young athletes, contributing to more precise risk management and prevention strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性观察性研究，揭示的是相关性而非因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective observational study, revealing correlation rather than causation.

items.title: Exploratory Assessment of Robotic Ankle Foot Orthosis Stiffness and Neutral Angle on Stair Ambulation in Individuals with Cerebral Palsy

items.titleZh: 探索性评估机器人踝足矫形器刚度和中立角度对脑瘫患者楼梯行走的影响

items.curatedReasonEn: Exploring the impact of robotic ankle-foot orthosis (AFO) stiffness and neutral angle on stair ambulation in individuals with cerebral palsy demonstrates the potential of customized assistive technology in pediatric rehabilitation. items.limitation: 本研究为探索性评估，样本量较小，且主要关注技术参数对步态的影响，而非长期功能改善。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory assessment with a small sample size, primarily focusing on the impact of technical parameters on gait rather than long-term functional improvement.

items.titleZh: 光生物调节促进美学冠延长术后原发伤口愈合和患者报告结局：一项初步随机临床试验

items.curatedReasonEn: Robot-assisted percutaneous vertebroplasty for osteoporotic vertebral compression fractures appears feasible in terms of clinical outcomes. items.title: [Correspondence] From targets to minutes: making movement advice actionable
items.summary: This correspondence suggests shifting physical activity messaging from aspirational thresholds to achievable marginal gains, showing that small increases in activity among the least active can yield the greatest population benefit, aligning with WHO guidance.
items.curatedReason: 这项通讯支持将运动建议从“目标”转变为“分钟数”，强调即使是少量增量运动也能带来显著的群体健康益处。在临床咨询中，你可以用这个视角鼓励久坐患者，突出小步快跑的价值，而不是宏大的活动量目标。
items.titleZh: 从目标到分钟：让运动建议更具可操作性
items.summaryZh: 这篇通讯提出，将运动量建议从理想阈值转变为可实现的边际增益，表明即使是活动量最少的人群，小幅度的活动增加也能带来最大的群体效益，与世卫组织指南相符。
items.curatedReasonEn: This correspondence supports shifting physical activity advice from 'targets' to 'minutes,' highlighting that even small incremental movements can yield significant population health benefits. In clinical consultations, you can use this perspective to encourage sedentary patients, emphasizing the value of small, achievable gains over ambitious activity goals.
items.limitation: 本研究为通讯，未提供原始研究设计和数据，且结论依赖于此前已发表的文章，可能存在二次解读的局限性。
items.limitationEn: This correspondence does not provide original study design or data, and its conclusions rely on previously published articles, potentially limiting secondary interpretation.

items.title: Outpatient rehabilitation can prevent suicide after acquired brain injury.

items.curatedReasonEn: This significant observational study suggests outpatient rehabilitation may play a crucial role in suicide prevention for brain injury patients. When developing long-term rehabilitation plans for stroke or TBI patients, integrate mental health screening and support as a routine consideration.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性登记研究，存在混杂因素和选择偏倚的风险，无法建立确切因果关系。

items.curatedReason: 本范围综述描绘了非侵入性神经刺激与互动数字技术结合在脊髓损伤康复中的现有证据图谱。它帮你快速掌握该领域技术现状和研究热点。
items.titleZh: 非侵入性神经刺激与互动数字技术在脊髓损伤康复中的联合应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述筛选了 494 篇相关研究，旨在描绘非侵入性神经刺激结合互动数字技术在脊髓损伤康复中的经验证据图谱。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review maps the existing evidence landscape for combined non-invasive neurostimulation and interactive digital technologies in SCI rehabilitation. Use it to quickly grasp the current technological status and research hotspots in this field.
items.limitation: 本综述是范围性综述，仅用于描绘现有证据，不进行荟萃分析或提供干预有效性的量化结论。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, intended to map existing evidence, not to perform meta-analysis or provide quantitative conclusions on intervention effectiveness.
items.journal: Journal of rehabilitation medicine

items.title: Beyond "Biomedical-Plus": Reclaiming the biopsychosocial model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy.
items.summary: This article argues that musculoskeletal physiotherapy's implementation of the biopsychosocial model often remains a "biomedical-plus" approach, suggesting a need to focus on therapist confidence, role clarity, and compassionate communication for true integration.
items.curatedReason: 该文批判性地指出，当前的生物心理社会（BPS）模式在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中常沦为“生物医学+”的附加模式。要实现真正整合，需聚焦于治疗师的信心、角色清晰度和沟通同情心。
items.titleZh: 超越“生物医学+”：在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中重塑生物心理社会模型
items.titleEn: Beyond "Biomedical-Plus": Reclaiming the biopsychosocial model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy.
items.summaryZh: 本文认为，肌肉骨骼物理治疗中生物心理社会（BPS）模型的实践常局限于“生物医学+”范式，提出需关注治疗师的信心、角色清晰度和同情心沟通，以实现真正整合。
items.curatedReasonEn: This paper critically points out that the current biopsychosocial (BPS) model in musculoskeletal physiotherapy often devolves into a "biomedical-plus" add-on. Achieving true integration requires focusing on therapist confidence, role clarity, and compassionate communication.
items.limitation: 概念性论述，非实证研究。
items.limitationEn: Conceptual discussion, not empirical research.
items.journal: Musculoskeletal science & practice

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective study of an advanced orthopedic virtual PT model found high patient engagement (62.8% evaluated, 70.9% completed care), with 96% of completers achieving MCID and high satisfaction, exceeding national benchmarks.
items.curatedReason: 该回顾性研究显示，先进的骨科远程 PT 模型在患者依从性（超过基准）和临床结局（96% 达到最小临床重要差异）方面表现出色，且满意度高。这为推广远程 PT 提供了有力证据。
items.titleZh: 先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模型下的患者参与度、临床结局和满意度：一项回顾性队列研究
items.titleEn: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summaryZh: 一项针对先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模型的 retrospective cohort study 显示，患者参与度高（62.8% 完成评估，70.9% 完成治疗），其中 96% 的完成者达到最小临床重要差异（MCID），满意度也高，超越了全国基准。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study demonstrates that an advanced orthopedic virtual PT model shows excellent patient adherence (exceeding benchmarks) and clinical outcomes (96% achieving MCID), with high satisfaction. It provides strong evidence for the broader adoption of virtual PT.
items.limitation: 回顾性研究，可能存在选择偏倚；数据收集来自特定提供商。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective study, potential selection bias; data collected from specific providers.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) Application in Neurorehabilitation: A Beginner’s Guide for Clinicians
items.summary: This beginner's guide for clinicians explains transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS) as a noninvasive brain stimulation technique for neurorehabilitation, noting its low cost, small footprint, and ease of combination with therapy.
items.curatedReason: 这篇入门指南为临床医生提供了关于经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）在神经康复中应用的实用介绍，强调了其成本效益、易用性和结合其他康复手段的潜力。
items.titleZh: 经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）在神经康复中的应用：临床医生入门指南
items.titleEn: Transcranial Direct Current Stimulation (tDCS) Application in Neurorehabilitation: A Beginner’s Guide for Clinicians
items.summaryZh: 这篇为临床医生准备的入门指南介绍了经颅直流电刺激（tDCS）作为一种用于神经康复的非侵入性脑刺激技术，并指出其成本低、占地小且易于与康复治疗结合的优点。
items.curatedReasonEn: This introductory guide offers clinicians a practical overview of transcranial direct current stimulation (tDCS) in neurorehabilitation, highlighting its cost-effectiveness, ease of use, and potential for integration with other therapies.
items.limitation: 指南性质，非实证研究；未提供具体操作的优化建议。
items.limitationEn: Guideline nature, not empirical research; does not offer optimization advice for specific protocols.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Exploring equity in telehealth interventions in physiotherapy: A meta-epidemiological study.
items.summary: A meta-epidemiological study of 94 telehealth equity trials in physiotherapy found that while telehealth interventions are increasingly studied, equity considerations, especially regarding socioeconomic status and social background, remain a gap.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃流行病学研究揭示，尽管物理治疗中的远程医疗研究日益增多，但仍需高度关注其公平性，特别是在社会经济地位和社会背景方面。未来推广远程 PT 时，切勿忽视这些潜在的数字鸿沟。
items.titleZh: 探索物理治疗远程干预中的公平性：一项荟萃流行病学研究
items.titleEn: Exploring equity in telehealth interventions in physiotherapy: A meta-epidemiological study.
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 94 项物理治疗远程干预公平性的荟萃流行病学研究发现，尽管远程干预研究日益增多，但在社会经济地位和社会背景等方面的公平性考量仍存在差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-epidemiological study reveals that despite increasing research on telehealth in physiotherapy, significant equity gaps persist, especially regarding socioeconomic status and social background. Do not overlook these potential digital divides as telehealth PT expands.
items.limitation: 基于已发表的 RCT，可能存在发表偏倚； PROGRESS+ 框架评估的公平性维度可能不足。
items.limitationEn: Based on published RCTs, potential publication bias; equity dimensions assessed by the PROGRESS+ framework may be limited.
items.journal: Brazilian journal of physical therapy

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summary: A descriptive analysis of a population-based cohort of 605 individuals with new spinal cord injury (SCI) found that 67% experienced sexual dysfunction during primary rehabilitation, including altered arousal, orgasmic dysfunction, and male erectile/ejaculatory issues.
items.curatedReason: 该描述性研究在脊髓损伤（SCI）康复期间，揭示了性功能障碍（包括唤起、高潮、月经、勃起和射精障碍）的高患病率（67%）。这提示康复团队应更关注性健康，并纳入筛查和干预。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤初级康复期间的性功能：一项基于人群的队列描述性分析
items.titleEn: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 605 名新发脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的基于人群的队列描述性分析显示，在初级康复期间，67% 的患者经历性功能障碍，包括唤起异常、高潮障碍以及男性勃起/射精功能问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This descriptive study reveals a high prevalence (67%) of sexual dysfunction during spinal cord injury (SCI) rehabilitation, including issues with arousal, orgasm, menstruation, erection, and ejaculation. This highlights the need for rehabilitation teams to address sexual health with screening and intervention.
items.limitation: 横断面分析，无法确定因果关系；数据来自特定地理区域。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional analysis, cannot determine causality; data from a specific region.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study exploring physiotherapists' experiences treating pain in children with cerebral palsy (CP) found that therapists focus on facilitating well-being, understanding pain through bodily practice, building alliances, and balancing emotional engagement with the reality that pain relief is not always possible.
items.curatedReason: 脑瘫儿童的疼痛管理，不能仅寄希望于止痛，更需关注其整体福祉的促进与症状的体验式理解。请在与家属建立联盟并平衡情感投入的同时，现实地认识到疼痛并非总能完全缓解。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是为有意义的生活做出贡献。”——物理治疗师治疗经历脑瘫疼痛的儿童和青少年：一项定性研究
items.titleEn: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summaryZh: 一项探讨物理治疗师治疗脑瘫（CP）儿童疼痛经验的定性研究发现，治疗师着重于通过身体实践促进健康、理解疼痛、建立联盟，并平衡情感投入与并非总能缓解疼痛的现实。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pain management for children with CP shouldn't solely focus on relief; prioritize promoting their overall well-being and understanding pain through embodied experience. Build alliances with families while realistically acknowledging that complete pain relief isn't always achievable.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（n=8），结果不具备普遍性。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size (n=8), findings may not be generalizable.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study aimed to develop and validate a machine learning model for predicting exercise intolerance (defined by peak oxygen uptake) at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using parameters available at hospital discharge.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究提示，基于出院时参数的机器学习模型可能预测心血管手术后运动不耐受。但模型在临床推广前，急需在更多元的数据集上进行外部验证。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期的运动不耐受
items.titleEn: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性队列研究旨在利用院内心脏手术出院时可用的临床参数，开发并验证一个机器学习模型，用于预测术后 3 个月时的运动不耐受（以峰值摄氧量定义）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study suggests a machine learning model using discharge parameters may predict post-cardiovascular surgery exercise intolerance. However, external validation on diverse datasets is crucial before clinical implementation.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究；模型需外部验证；仅关注最大摄氧量（VO2peak）。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective cohort study; model requires external validation; focused only on VO2peak.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs found combined biopsychosocial interventions to be effective in reducing pain and functional disability in adults with chronic low back pain compared to usual care, waiting-list controls, and active unimodal interventions.
items.curatedReason: 这份高质量的系统综述和荟萃分析进一步巩固了生物心理社会干预对慢性腰痛的疗效。在处理这类患者时，应将其视为优于常规护理或单一模式干预的综合方案。
items.titleZh: 生物心理社会联合干预对慢性腰痛的疗效：随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析显示，与常规护理、等待名单对照和单一模式主动干预相比，生物心理社会联合干预在减轻慢性腰痛成年患者的疼痛和功能障碍方面有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This high-quality systematic review and meta-analysis further solidifies the efficacy of combined biopsychosocial interventions for chronic low back pain. Consider it a superior comprehensive approach compared to usual care or unimodal interventions for these patients.
items.limitation: 研究未明确指出不同干预结构之间效应的一致性，可能需要根据具体患者情况进行个体化调整。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly state the consistency of effects across different intervention structures, suggesting a need for individualized adjustments based on specific patient conditions.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Effectiveness of Combined Biopsychosocial Interventions for Chronic Low Back Pain: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials

items.title: Digital Addiction and Body Balance: An Investigation of Postural Stability in Young Adults: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 74 young adults (mean age 22.06 years) found that smartphone addiction was associated with impaired postural stability.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究提示数字成瘾可能与姿势稳定性受损有关，为你的评估提供一个潜在的风险因素维度。
items.titleZh: 数字成瘾与身体平衡：年轻人姿势稳定性调查
items.summaryZh: 一项对 74 名年轻人（平均年龄 22.06 岁）进行的横断面研究发现，智能手机成瘾与姿势稳定性受损相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study suggests digital addiction may be linked to impaired postural stability, offering a potential risk factor dimension for your assessments.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified and mapped telerehabilitation intervention models and outcome domains during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors, highlighting evidence gaps.
items.curatedReason: 卒中患者出院后居家远程康复模式与效果尚有空白。这篇范围综述提示我们，该领域仍缺乏统一的干预模型和明确的结果指标。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者出院居家过渡期的远程康复：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别并绘制了卒中幸存者从医院到家庭过渡期间远程康复的干预模型、结果领域及证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: Telerehabilitation for stroke survivors transitioning home lacks clear models and outcomes. This scoping review indicates significant gaps in defining both intervention models and measurable outcomes in this area.
items.limitation: 范围综述侧重于识别和映射研究，而非评估干预措施的疗效或进行荟萃分析。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews focus on identifying and mapping research, not evaluating intervention efficacy or conducting meta-analyses.
items.journal: Clinical rehabilitation

items.title: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study characterized the demographic, clinical, and healthcare utilization profiles of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain, revealing insights into access and referrals.
items.curatedReason: 西班牙私立前庭物理治疗诊所的患者，以女性居多，且多由耳鼻喉科医生转诊。如果你在相似的诊所执业，这提示你在市场推广和与专科医生合作上可以有所侧重。
items.titleZh: 西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者概况：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究描述了西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者的人口学、临床和医疗利用概况，揭示了就诊途径和转诊情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients in Spanish private vestibular physiotherapy clinics are predominantly female and largely referred by ENTs. If you're in a similar practice, this suggests targeting your outreach and specialist collaborations accordingly.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法推断患者特征与治疗结果之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study, being cross-sectional, cannot infer causal relationships between patient characteristics and treatment outcomes.
items.journal: Physiotherapy

items.title: Comparative efficacy of different joint mobilization techniques in shoulder adhesive capsulitis: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs compared the clinical effects of different non-thrust joint mobilization approaches for shoulder adhesive capsulitis on objective and subjective outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 对于肩关节粘连性囊炎，多种非冲击性关节松动术在缓解疼痛和改善功能上都有效果，但没有哪种方法能证明其绝对优越性。现有证据提示，不同技术在短期和中期效果相似，但长期疗效尚不明确，仍需根据患者个体情况选择。
items.titleZh: 不同关节松动技术对肩关节粘连性囊炎的疗效比较：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析比较了不同非冲动性关节松动技术对肩关节粘连性囊炎患者客观和主观结局的临床效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: For shoulder adhesive capsulitis, various non-thrust joint mobilization techniques are effective for pain relief and functional improvement, but none demonstrates absolute superiority. Current evidence suggests similar short- and mid-term effects, while long-term efficacy remains unclear. Individualized patient assessment is still key.
items.limitation: 研究纳入标准限制了发布年份和语言，可能遗漏了部分相关研究。
items.limitationEn: The inclusion criteria limited publication years and language, potentially omitting some relevant studies.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Assessment and Management Practices for Post-Stroke Shoulder Pain Among Rehabilitation Professionals in Vietnam: A Cross-Sectional Survey.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey investigated post-stroke shoulder pain (PSSP) assessment and management practices among rehabilitation professionals in 14 Vietnamese hospitals, identifying potential evidence-practice gaps and barriers to effective care.
items.curatedReason: 这项越南的横断面调查揭示了卒中后肩痛评估和管理实践中存在的证据与实践差距，以及临床医生面临的障碍，为优化低收入和中等收入国家的康复策略提供了基础数据。
items.titleZh: 越南康复专业人员卒中后肩痛评估与管理实践：一项横断面调查
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面调查探讨了越南 14 家医院康复专业人员对卒中后肩痛的评估和管理实践，旨在发现潜在的证据与实践差距以及有效护理的障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional survey from Vietnam highlights evidence-practice gaps and barriers faced by clinicians in post-stroke shoulder pain assessment and management, providing foundational data for optimizing rehabilitation strategies in low- and middle-income countries.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面调查，仅反映了特定时间点的实践情况和感知障碍，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey reflects practices and perceived barriers at a specific time point and cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: A scoping review of outcome and outcome measure sets for adults with spinal cord injury, stroke, and traumatic brain injury.
items.summary: A scoping review synthesized outcome domains and measures included in core outcome sets and standard outcome measure sets for stroke, traumatic brain injury, and spinal cord injury, also examining patient involvement in development.
items.curatedReason: 在卒中、脑外伤和脊髓损伤领域，核心结局集（COS）和标准结局测量集（SOMS）的患者参与度不一，特别是肢体功能和活动领域。为确保评估的全面性和患者相关性，未来COS和SOMS的开发应更广泛地纳入患者视角。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人结局及结局测量集范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述综合了脊髓损伤、卒中和创伤性脑损伤成人核心结局集和标准结局测量集中包含的结局领域和测量方法，并考察了患者参与其开发的情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patient involvement in Core Outcome Sets (COS) and Standard Outcome Measure Sets (SOMS) for stroke, TBI, and SCI varies, especially concerning limb function and activity domains. Future COS and SOMS development should more broadly incorporate patient perspectives to ensure comprehensive and patient-relevant assessments.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质决定了其侧重于现有文献的广度而非深度，未对证据质量进行严格评估。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, its nature prioritizes breadth over depth of existing literature and does not rigorously assess evidence quality.
items.journal: Journal of rehabilitation medicine

items.title: Applications of ICF-Based Assessments and Interventions in Post-Stroke Rehabilitation: A Narrative Review.
items.summary: A narrative review examined current applications of the International Classification of Functioning, Disability and Health (ICF) in post-stroke rehabilitation, benchmarking them against the United Kingdom Stroke Guideline.
items.curatedReason: ICF框架在英国卒中指南中并未得到充分体现，指南推荐的评估工具主要集中在身体功能层面。要实现卒中康复的全面性，我们需更多地将活动、参与及环境因素纳入评估范畴，避免过分强调生理功能而忽视患者的整体生活质量。
items.titleZh: 基于 ICF 的评估和干预在卒中后康复中的应用：一项叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一项叙述性综述审查了 ICF 在卒中后康复中的当前应用，并以英国卒中指南为基准进行了比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: The ICF framework is not fully reflected in the UK Stroke Guideline, with recommended assessment tools largely focused on Body Function. To achieve comprehensive stroke rehabilitation, we need to broaden assessments to include Activity, Participation, and Environmental Factors, avoiding an overemphasis on physiological function at the expense of overall quality of life.
items.limitation: 叙述性综述的性质限制了其对文献的系统性和深度分析，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a narrative review limits its systematic and in-depth analysis of the literature, potentially introducing selection bias.
items.journal: NeuroRehabilitation

items.title: Real-World Outcomes of a Telephone-Based Virtual Cognitive Rehabilitation Therapy Program: A Retrospective Cohort Analysis
items.summary: A retrospective observational analysis of 141 older adults with mild cognitive impairment (61.7%) and early-stage dementia (29.1%) evaluated a telephone-based virtual cognitive rehabilitation program, showing improved daily functioning post-treatment.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列分析显示，基于电话的虚拟认知康复项目对轻度认知障碍和早期痴呆患者是有效的，能改善日常生活功能。这提示远程认知康复是可行且有益的，可以作为扩大服务可及性的一种选择。
items.titleZh: 电话虚拟认知康复治疗项目的真实世界结果：一项回顾性队列分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 141 名轻度认知障碍（61.7%）和早期痴呆（29.1%）老年人的回顾性观察分析评估了一个基于电话的虚拟认知康复项目，结果显示治疗后日常生活功能有所改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort analysis suggests that a telephone-based virtual cognitive rehabilitation program is effective for individuals with mild cognitive impairment and early-stage dementia, improving daily functioning. This indicates that remote cognitive rehabilitation is feasible and beneficial, offering an option to expand service accessibility.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性观察研究，存在选择偏倚和混杂因素的风险，且缺乏随机对照组。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective observational study with risks of selection bias and confounding factors, and it lacks a randomized control group.

items.title: Professional reintegration after stroke: experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors.
items.summary: An observational study explored the return to work (RTW) experiences of 1,175 Portuguese stroke survivors 18-24 months post-stroke, focusing on perceived consequences, barriers, and enablers.
items.curatedReason: 这项对葡萄牙卒中幸存者的观察性研究揭示了他们重返工作岗位的经验、障碍和促成因素。这提醒你在康复计划中需更关注社会和职业 reintegration 的支持。
items.titleZh: 卒中后职业再融合：葡萄牙卒中幸存者的经验
items.summaryZh: 一项观察性研究探讨了 1,175 名葡萄牙卒中幸存者在卒中后 18-24 个月的重返工作（RTW）经验，重点关注了感知到的后果、障碍和促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study of Portuguese stroke survivors reveals their experiences, barriers, and enablers for returning to work. This highlights the need to focus more on social and vocational reintegration support in rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性研究，依赖自我报告问卷，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚，且无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This observational study relies on self-reported questionnaires, which may have recall and reporting biases, and cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Topics in stroke rehabilitation

items.title: Development and Preliminary Clinical Feasibility of a Wearable Nanovibration Delivery Device for Localised Bone Stimulation in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: Researchers developed and evaluated the preliminary clinical feasibility of a wearable device delivering localized 1 kHz nanovibration to the distal femur for bone stimulation in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI), showing successful delivery and monitoring.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提出了一种针对脊髓损伤患者的可穿戴纳米振动骨刺激设备，在小样本健康受试者和SCI患者中展现了初步可行性。尽管前景乐观，但其在预防或逆转SCI骨质流失方面的临床疗效和长期安全性仍需大规模RCT验证，目前不宜推广应用。
items.titleZh: 用于脊髓损伤患者局部骨刺激的可穿戴纳振动输送设备的开发及初步临床可行性
items.summaryZh: 研究人员开发并评估了一种可穿戴设备，用于为脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的股骨远端提供局部 1 kHz 纳振动骨刺激，结果显示该设备能成功输送和监测振动，具有初步临床可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study proposes a wearable nanovibration bone stimulation device for SCI patients, showing preliminary feasibility in a small sample of healthy subjects and SCI patients. While promising, its clinical efficacy in preventing or reversing SCI-related bone loss and long-term safety require large-scale RCT validation; it is not ready for widespread clinical use.
items.limitation: 该研究处于早期阶段，仅评估了设备的初步可行性，样本量小，且主要基于健康志愿者和少数 SCI 患者。
items.limitationEn: This study is in an early stage, only evaluating preliminary device feasibility with a small sample, primarily based on healthy volunteers and a few SCI patients.

items.title: Examination and treatment of the spine for upper extremity pain: a case series.
items.summary: A case series described three patients with upper extremity pain (elbow, shoulder, wrist) who received spine mobilization or manipulation techniques, achieving clinically significant improvements in self-reported disability.
items.curatedReason: 这个病例系列提醒你，上肢疼痛患者可能存在脊柱功能障碍。但鉴于这只是 3 个病例，仅能作为临床提示，不能直接推广到日常实践。
items.titleZh: 针对上肢疼痛的脊柱检查和治疗：一个病例系列
items.summaryZh: 一个病例系列描述了三名上肢疼痛患者（肘、肩、腕），他们接受了脊柱松动或手法治疗技术，并在自我报告的残疾程度方面取得了临床显著改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case series reminds you that upper extremity pain patients might have concurrent spine dysfunction. However, given it's only 3 cases, it serves as a clinical prompt, not a direct recommendation for routine practice.
items.limitation: 病例系列证据等级低，仅包含 3 名患者，缺乏对照组，无法得出普遍性结论。
items.limitationEn: As a case series, the evidence level is low, involving only 3 patients with no control group, preventing generalizable conclusions.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: "If you don't sort out these problems, you end up building problems": a qualitative study exploring mouthcare at home with people with Parkinson's and their partners in care.
items.summary: A qualitative study, using semi-structured interviews with 13 people with Parkinson's and 7 partners in care, explored experiences and barriers to performing mouthcare activities at home, identifying three main themes.
items.curatedReason: 帕金森病患者在家中进行口腔护理面临多重障碍，不仅是运动症状，还包括疲劳、情绪低落和缺乏支持。作为临床医生，我们需要认识到口腔护理对患者生活质量的重要性，并提供更个性化、考虑照护者负担的策略。
items.titleZh: “如果你不解决这些问题，最终会堆积成更多问题”：一项探索帕金森病患者及其照护伙伴在家进行口腔护理的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究通过对 13 名帕金森病患者和 7 名照护伙伴进行半结构化访谈，探讨了在家进行口腔护理的经验和障碍，并确定了三个主要主题。
items.curatedReasonEn: People with Parkinson's face multiple barriers to home mouthcare, including not only motor symptoms but also fatigue, low mood, and lack of support. As clinicians, we must recognize the importance of oral care for their quality of life and offer more personalized strategies that consider the burden on caregivers.
items.limitation: 定性研究样本量较小（20 人），结果可能不具普遍性，主要反映了特定人群的经验。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study with a small sample size (20 individuals), the findings may not be generalizable and primarily reflect the experiences of a specific population.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: APTA, Hartford HealthCare Launch Frailty Pilot to Advance Value-Based Care
items.summary: APTA and Hartford HealthCare launched a pilot program to test an early frailty identification and intervention model, aiming to advance value-based care and position physical therapists at the forefront of prevention for aging populations.
items.curatedReason: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 启动了一项针对衰弱的试点项目，旨在通过物理治疗师主导的早期识别和干预，推动基于价值的照护模式。这预示着美国物理治疗在预防老年衰弱和价值医疗体系中的角色将得到加强，值得你密切关注其后续成果，为你在实践中争取更重要的预防和管理角色提供佐证。
items.titleZh: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 启动衰弱试点项目，推进价值医疗
items.summaryZh: APTA 和 Hartford HealthCare 启动了一项试点项目，旨在通过衰弱的早期识别和干预模型，推动价值医疗，并将物理治疗师置于老年人口预防工作的前沿。
items.curatedReasonEn: APTA and Hartford HealthCare have launched a frailty pilot program, aiming to advance value-based care through physical therapist-led early identification and intervention. This signals a strengthening role for physical therapy in preventing geriatric frailty and within value-based healthcare in the US. You should closely monitor its outcomes to support your practice in advocating for a more significant role in prevention and management.
items.limitation: 这是一个初步的试点项目，其效果和成本效益仍需进一步的数据验证和长期观察。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary pilot project, and its efficacy and cost-effectiveness still require further data validation and long-term observation.

items.title: High-intensity interval training in cancer patients: a bayesian meta-analysis of effects on VO2max, dose–response, and adherence | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A Bayesian meta-analysis on high-intensity interval training (HIIT) in cancer patients investigated its effects on VO2max, dose-response, and adherence, confirming positive impacts and good patient tolerance.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对癌症患者高强度间歇训练（HIIT）的贝叶斯荟萃分析，证实了 HIIT 对最大摄氧量（VO2max）的积极影响、剂量反应关系以及良好的依从性。这表明你可以更有信心地将 HIIT 纳入癌症患者的康复方案，但仍需根据个体情况调整，确保安全性和有效性。
items.titleZh: 癌症患者高强度间歇训练：VO2max、剂量反应和依从性的贝叶斯荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对癌症患者高强度间歇训练（HIIT）的贝叶斯荟萃分析，研究了其对最大摄氧量（VO2max）、剂量反应和依从性的影响，证实了积极效果和良好的患者耐受性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Bayesian meta-analysis on high-intensity interval training (HIIT) in cancer patients confirms its positive impact on VO2max, dose-response relationship, and good adherence. This suggests you can more confidently incorporate HIIT into cancer patient rehabilitation programs, while still individualizing adjustments to ensure safety and effectiveness.
items.limitation: 虽然是贝叶斯荟萃分析，但癌症患者群体异质性大，不同癌症类型和治疗阶段的适用性仍需谨慎考虑。
items.limitationEn: Although a Bayesian meta-analysis, the cancer patient population is highly heterogeneous, and applicability across different cancer types and treatment stages still requires careful consideration.
